description: Total revenue from all operating segments — postal, parcel, aviation, logistics, retail
Variable costs directly attributable to revenue — linehaul, fuel, last-mile, COGS
Revenue minus direct costs — measures unit economics and pricing power
Gross profit as a percentage of revenue — pricing health indicator
All employee-related costs — salaries, benefits, EPF, training
Operating expenses excluding direct costs and staff — rent, utilities, IT, marketing, insurance, D&A
Depreciation and amortization — non-cash charge representing asset consumption
Earnings before interest, tax, depreciation, and amortization — proxy for cash from operations
EBITDA as a percentage of revenue — operational profitability without capital structure effects
Earnings before interest and tax — operating profit including D&A
EBIT as a percentage of revenue — accounting operating profitability
Cost of debt financing — interest on borrowings
Foreign exchange impact — gains positive, losses negative
EBIT less interest plus FX — earnings before tax provision
Corporate income tax provision — typically 22-24% of taxable profit in Malaysia
Bottom-line profit attributable to shareholders — final P&L line
Net profit as a percentage of revenue — overall profitability ratio
Revenue locked to Actual scenario — used in side-by-side comparisons
Revenue locked to Budget scenario — annual plan baseline
Revenue locked to Forecast scenario — rolling re-forecast view
Revenue locked to Prior Year scenario — same period last year
EBIT locked to Actual scenario
EBIT locked to Budget scenario
EBIT locked to Forecast scenario
EBIT locked to Prior Year scenario
Absolute revenue variance — Actual minus Budget
Percentage revenue variance vs Budget
Absolute revenue variance — Actual minus Prior Year
Percentage revenue variance vs Prior Year — YoY growth
Absolute EBIT variance — Actual minus Budget
Absolute EBIT variance — Actual minus Prior Year

description: Margin variance in percentage points — IBCS standard for margin comparisons
Universal variance respecting cost sign convention — positive always favorable to EBIT
Absolute value of variance — used for top-N ranking regardless of direction
Year-to-date revenue accumulation
Month-to-date revenue — at monthly grain equals single month
Quarter-to-date revenue accumulation
Trailing 12-month revenue — smooths seasonality for trend detection
YTD revenue for the same period last year
YTD percentage growth vs prior-year YTD
Year-to-date EBIT accumulation
Trailing 12-month EBIT — smooths seasonality
Total parcels delivered across all entities and tiers
Net parcel revenue after discounts — distinct from gross
Gross parcel revenue before customer discounts

Net parcel revenue minus variable cost — contribution to fixed costs and profit
Yield per parcel — net revenue divided by parcel count

Margin per parcel — most actionable parcel KPI for pricing decisions
Average discount from gross to net revenue — competitive pricing pressure indicator
Year-over-year parcel volume growth percentage
YoY change in yield — key indicator of pricing power
YoY change in unit margin — captures combined yield and cost effects
Revenue change driven by volume change at prior-year prices
Revenue change driven by price change on current-year volumes
Revenue change driven by shift in product/tier mix
Validation measure — should always equal zero

Days Sales Outstanding — average days to collect receivables
Days Payable Outstanding — average days before paying suppliers

DSO plus DIO minus DPO — total days cash is tied up in operations
Total accounts receivable balance
